ForgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
ForgotPassword.intro: Enter the email on your account. If we find it, we will email you a link to set a new password (valid for one hour).
ForgotPassword.spamHint: If the email does not show up in a few minutes, check your spam, Promotions, or junk folder.
ForgotPassword.checkEmail: If an account exists for that address, you will receive an email with a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.smtpNotConfigured: Password reset by email is not set up on this server. Please contact an administrator for help.
ForgotPassword.emailSendFailed: We could not send the email. Try again in a few minutes, or ask an administrator for help.
ForgotPassword.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
ForgotPassword.adminBody: If you no longer have access to your email, or the link has expired, your building or condominium administrator can still restore your access.

Auth.tagline: Comprehensive management for Condominiums, Buildings, and Shopping Centers
Auth.loginInstructions: Enter your credentials to access the portal.
Auth.registerInstructions: Join ADESSO-365 and manage your property with elegance.
Auth.heroCaption: Solution for communities in Guatemala City: condominiums, towers, and shopping centers.

residentDashboard.allClear: You are up to date with your payments!

adminResetPassword.title: Password for resident (admin)
adminResetPassword.description: You generate or set a password and deliver it to the resident yourself (phone, WhatsApp, in person). The app does not email it.
adminResetPassword.generateHint: The system creates a secure password. It is shown only once in a window — copy it and send it to the resident by your usual channel.
adminResetPassword.generatedToast: Password created — copy it from the dialog.
adminResetPassword.manualSuccess: Password saved. Tell the resident the new password through a secure channel.
adminResetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
adminResetPassword.modalWarning: Copy this password now. It is not saved in plain text and cannot be shown again.
adminResetPassword.modalFooter: Give this password to the resident by a trusted channel. After login they can change it in their profile.

Services.confirmUnsubscribeMessage: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from this service? It will no longer be included in future invoices.

form.requiredHelp: Required services are automatically assigned to every unit in the complex.
form.quantityHelp: Use for parking, storage, etc. where a unit may have multiple.

table.actionsNeedResidentMethod: Waiting for the resident to choose a payment method

modal.confirmRequiresMethod: Select a payment method to continue

Invoices.loadError: Could not load invoices. If you just updated the app, run database migrations.
Invoices.paymentIntentSaveError: Could not save the payment method. Try again.
Invoices.successPaymentSelected: Payment request registered. Please proceed with cash or transfer payment.

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.message: Your payment has been processed correctly. Thank you.
success.note: The status of your invoice will be updated in a few minutes.
success.notPaidMessage: This session is not confirmed as paid in Recurrente—nothing was charged. If you used the browser back button during checkout, the flow was interrupted; start payment again.
success.notPaidPlatformReleased: Your platform subscription card attempt was released. You can try paying again.
success.verifyErrorMessage: We could not check payment status with Recurrente. Check subscription or invoices later, or contact support if you were charged.
success.noReferenceMessage: This page has no valid session id. Go back to invoices or subscription and start checkout again.

cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
cancel.message: The payment process was cancelled. No charges were made.
cancel.platformReleased: Your card checkout attempt was cleared. You can try again anytime.

PWAInstall.title: Install the app on this device
PWAInstall.subtitle: Install ADESSO-365 for a faster and more native experience.
PWAInstall.benefit1: Open instantly from your home screen or desktop.
PWAInstall.waitingPrompt: If the install button stays disabled, open your browser menu and choose "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
PWAInstall.manualHelp: Open your browser menu and choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
PWAInstall.statusDirect: Direct install available from this button.
PWAInstall.statusManual: If installation does not open, use your browser menu.
PWAInstall.postLogoutNotifyBody: You signed out of the installed app. Enable notifications again to get community alerts.

Documents.title: Documents
Documents.subtitle: View and download official documents, bylaws, and complex policies.
Documents.empty: No documents are available for this complex.
Documents.deleteModalMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
Documents.dropzoneHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP — Max 4 MB
Documents.toastInvalidType: File type not allowed. Only PDF and images.
Documents.toastFileTooBig: The file exceeds the 4 MB limit.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings.

airbnb.title: Short-term guests (Airbnb)
airbnb.description: Tell us if you host Airbnb guests and the stay details. Complex administration can view this information.
airbnb.saveError: Could not save. Please check the form.
airbnb.disabledByComplex: Your complex turned off short-term guest registration. If you need to change an existing record, contact administration.

notifications.title: Push Notifications
notifications.description: Enable notifications to receive complex alerts (invoices, reservations, visits, incidents, events, and more) on this device. Available for all roles.
notifications.httpsRequired: ⚠️ Push notifications require HTTPS or localhost.
notifications.iosSupportHint: On iPhone/iPad, push works best when you add the app to the Home Screen (PWA) and open it from the icon. In non-installed Safari, support is limited.
notifications.browserUnsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications or is in incognito mode.

iosInstallHint.prefix: On iOS: for reliable push notifications, use
iosInstallHint.suffix: and open the app from its icon.

notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser site settings.
notifications.subscribeErrorMissingKey: NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is missing on the server. Add it to .env and restart the app.
notifications.subscribeErrorVapid: The VAPID public key is invalid. Generate a pair with: npx web-push generate-vapid-keys — put publicKey in NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY and privateKey in VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY (no quotes or line breaks).
notifications.subscribeErrorPushService: The browser rejected push registration (bad VAPID key, blocked network, or device policy). Check keys, try another network or browser; on iPhone use the Home Screen installed app.

Unassigned.title: Assignment Pending
Unassigned.message: Welcome to ADESSO-365. Your account has been created, but you haven't been assigned to a residential complex yet.
Unassigned.subtitle: What should I do?
Unassigned.instruction1: Contact your building's administration to be registered.
Unassigned.instruction2: Ensure you have provided the correct email address associated with your unit.
Unassigned.instruction3: Once assigned, you will have access to all your complex's data and actions.

Reports.title: Reports & Analytics
Reports.subtitle: Complex performance and statistics overview
Reports.noData: No data available for the selected complexes

Settings.title: Complex Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage permissions and module visibility for each user role in this complex, including short-term guests (Airbnb) per role.
Settings.bankAccountHelp: This information will be shown to residents when selecting the Transfer method.
Settings.whatsappHelp: Number where residents will send their payment proofs. (Include country code without + sign)
Settings.errorDesc: Could not save the settings. Please try again.
Settings.selectComplexHelp: Please select a complex to configure its permissions.
Settings.recurrenteWebhookHelp: Secret required to validate payments automatically. Leave blank if you don't have one yet.
Settings.pwaManualHelp: Open your browser menu and choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
Settings.pwaStatusDirect: Direct install available from this button.
Settings.pwaStatusManual: If installation does not open, use your browser menu.
Settings.platformRecurrenteHint: These keys are for charging residents (invoices and reservations). Platform subscription billing is separate (Subscription menu) and is paid to the platform operator's Recurrente account.

PlatformSubscription.title: Platform subscription
PlatformSubscription.subtitle: Pay for your complex's software use by card (Recurrente) or bank transfer.
PlatformSubscription.accessUntilGraceHint: Includes your complex signup date and {days} grace day(s). After you subscribe, this shows your paid coverage period.
PlatformSubscription.accessIncludesGrace: With grace days enabled, system access may continue through {date}.
PlatformSubscription.graceBreakdownNote: Includes {days} day(s) of grace. The paid subscription period itself ends {paidThrough}.
PlatformSubscription.none: No active paid period on file
PlatformSubscription.notConfigured: No payment method is configured (card or bank transfer). Contact support.
PlatformSubscription.noComplex: You are not assigned as a complex administrator.
PlatformSubscription.transferCreatedToast: Instructions are ready. Complete the transfer and wait for confirmation.
PlatformSubscription.transferPendingExplainer: A payment is pending. After you transfer, send proof as described below. Once the platform administrator verifies the payment, your coverage will be extended.
PlatformSubscription.referenceProofBody: Send a photo of the transfer via WhatsApp to {phone} (super administrator).
PlatformSubscription.referenceProofBodyNoPhone: Send a photo of the transfer to the super administrator. They need a phone number on their profile, or set PLATFORM_SUBSCRIPTION_PROOF_PHONE on the server.
PlatformSubscription.renewHint: Paying extends coverage from today or from the end of your current period, whichever is later.
PlatformSubscription.onePaymentPerMonthNote: You can only start one subscription payment per calendar month (per complex).
PlatformSubscription.blockPendingTransfer: A bank transfer is pending verification by the platform administrator. Wait for confirmation or contact support before starting another payment.
PlatformSubscription.blockPendingCard: A card checkout is in progress: when Recurrente approves it, your subscription is confirmed automatically (no manual review). If you closed the window without paying, use the button below to release and try again.
PlatformSubscription.releaseCardButton: Cancel card attempt and try again
PlatformSubscription.releaseCardHint: Use this if you closed Recurrente without paying and the screen stays blocked.
PlatformSubscription.releaseCardSuccess: Done. You can start a payment again.
PlatformSubscription.releaseCardError: Could not release the checkout attempt
PlatformSubscription.blockPaidThisMonth: A subscription payment was already recorded this month. You can start another next month.
PlatformSubscription.historySubtitle: Card charges appear here after Recurrente confirms them (automatic). Bank transfers awaiting verification are listed here too.
PlatformSubscription.historyInvoicePending: The invoice is created once the payment is confirmed.
PlatformSubscription.historyInvoiceNoUnits: No receipt linked yet. Reload the page or contact support if the payment already cleared.
PlatformSubscription.historyEmpty: No platform subscription payment for the current month yet.
PlatformSubscription.termsAcceptIntro: I have read and accept the
PlatformSubscription.termsAcceptOutro: of the ADESSO-365 platform on behalf of the complex I represent.
PlatformSubscription.termsCheckboxHint: You must accept the legal documents to start payment.

PlatformLegalDocs.termsUpdated: Version {version}. Replace this copy with counsel-approved terms.
PlatformLegalDocs.termsBody:
This is placeholder Terms of use text. ADESSO-365 should replace it with the definitive legal agreement for the condominium management software service.

By using the platform and purchasing a subscription, the complex acknowledges that the binding contractual content is the version published here and updated per the stated version.

For service or billing questions, the complex should contact the platform operator through official support channels.
PlatformLegalDocs.legalUpdated: Version {version}. Replace this copy with the appropriate legal notice or policy.
PlatformLegalDocs.legalBody:
This is placeholder legal information (legal notice, liability, warranty disclaimer, or other provisions defined by counsel).

The platform is offered as software; specific obligations between the operator and each complex must be stated in the applicable contractual documentation.

Any dispute shall be governed by the laws and jurisdiction set out in the definitive documentation approved by ADESSO-365.

PlatformSubscriptionGate.title: Platform subscription expired
PlatformSubscriptionGate.descriptionPayers: The complex must renew the platform subscription. As an administrator or board member you can complete payment here.
PlatformSubscriptionGate.descriptionOthers: The complex is past due on the platform subscription. Only an administrator or the board of directors can renew—please contact them.

PlatformPaymentsAdmin.title: Platform subscription payments
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.subtitle: History of subscription payments from complexes.
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.keysHintComplex: Full payment history for your complex. Pending bank transfers must be confirmed by a super administrator.
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.searchPlaceholderComplex: Search by payment ID or checkout…
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.rejectTransferConfirm: Reject this transfer? The complex administrator will be able to start a new payment.
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.rejectSuccess: Transfer rejected; the complex can pay again
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.searchPlaceholder: Search by complex, payment id, or checkout id…
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.keysHint: Configure keys and bank-transfer instructions under Platform Recurrente (or environment variables). Card webhook URL is the same as for invoices (/api/payments/webhook).
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.filterComplexHint: The list loads only after you pick a complex or “All complexes”. Your choice is saved in this browser.
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.filterComplexPickTable: Select a complex above (or “All complexes”) to load payments.
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.reconcileHint: Each complex may only have one valid platform fee per UTC month. Extras are marked cancelled.
PlatformPaymentsAdmin.reconcileSuccess: Done: {count} duplicate payment(s) marked as cancelled.

PlatformRecurrente.title: Recurrente — platform billing
PlatformRecurrente.subtitle: Subscription pricing, Recurrente keys, and bank transfer instructions.
PlatformRecurrente.intro: Price and months-per-payment apply to the Subscription screen. Public/secret/webhook override RECURRENTE_* or PLATFORM_* on the server. Per-complex keys under Settings remain for resident invoices and reservations.
PlatformRecurrente.subscriptionPriceHelp: Leave blank to use PLATFORM_SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_GTQ or the default (199).
PlatformRecurrente.subscriptionGraceDaysHelp: After the complex’s paid-through date, these extra days keep the app usable before it is blocked. 0 = no grace. Blank = PLATFORM_SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS or 0.
PlatformRecurrente.subscriptionGraceDaysInvalid: Enter an integer from 0 to 365, or leave blank.
PlatformRecurrente.subscriptionPriceInvalid: Enter a valid price (number greater than 0).
PlatformRecurrente.subscriptionPeriodInvalid: Enter months between 1 and 120, or leave blank.
PlatformRecurrente.secretHelp: Leave blank to keep the current secret.
PlatformRecurrente.webhookHelp: Same endpoint as residents: /api/payments/webhook. Leave blank if you are not changing the secret.
PlatformRecurrente.bankInstructionsPlaceholder: Bank, account type, beneficiary name, IBAN or account number, memo guidance…
PlatformRecurrente.bankInstructionsHelp: Free text shown to complex admins when they choose Pay by bank transfer. You can also set PLATFORM_SUBSCRIPTION_BANK_INSTRUCTIONS on the server.

Communications.title: Communications
Communications.subtitle: Stay informed and actively participate in your community
Communications.announcementsDesc: Check and manage the official community announcements.
Communications.eventsDesc: Discover and participate in community activities and assemblies.

Polls.subtitle: Participate in your community's decisions digitally.
Polls.noPolls: There are no active polls at the moment.

form.title: Poll Title
form.titlePlaceholder: Ex: What color should we paint the facade?

Polls.selectComplexHelp: Select a complex to see its polls.
Polls.noPollsFound: No polls found under this filter.
